main.name: Zack Gao
main.description: Software Engineer | M.S. Computer Science | Full-Stack Development • Cloud Computing • AI/LLMs • React • Spring
main.bio: I am a software engineer with a strong background in full-stack web application development and cloud-based solutions. I worked for Community CPA & Associates Inc. as a Software Engineer. There, I led the development of full-stack applications using React.js, Spring, and MySQL. I am currently pursuing an MS in Computer Science at Stevens Institute of Technology.
main.contactmessage: Here is where you should write your message to readers to have them get in contact with you.

resume.skillmessage: Full-stack software engineer with experience building scalable web applications and cloud-native systems across the JavaScript and Java ecosystems.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Relevant Courses: Distributed Systems and Cloud Computing, Enterprise Software Architecture and Design, Cybersecurity, Mathematical Foundations of Machine Learning

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Relevant Courses: Data Abstractions & Structures, Database Systems, Web Programming, Software Engineering and Architecture Design

work.title: Applied AI Intern
work.description: Develop and optimize AI-powered applications using Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, and AI agent technologies. Design, test, and deploy intelligent automation workflows and software solutions with Python, APIs, and modern AI development tools. Collect, process, and analyze data to evaluate model performance and continuously improve AI system accuracy and user experience. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to research emerging AI technologies and bring them into production.

work.title: Software Engineer
work.description: Built a full-stack client portal with CRM using React.js, Spring Boot, and MySQL, and partnered with the payroll team to design a one-click payroll check generation system. Implemented RESTful APIs for document uploads/downloads, invoice payments, and payroll distribution, then deployed on Microsoft Azure (App Services, Azure SQL, load balancing) with redundancy and auto-scaling for high availability. Added real-time monitoring and alerting with Azure Monitor. The application cut payroll processing time by 70%, was adopted by 2000+ clients within the first month, and contributed to a 15% increase in company revenue.

work.title: Software Engineer Intern
work.description: Built an end-to-end email marketing customer journey workflow UI in TypeScript, letting users visually design complex workflows through a drag-and-drop interface. Integrated with backend services over GraphQL to generate and configure email campaigns from user-defined logic. The intuitive UI reduced manual setup time by 80%, streamlined campaign creation, and improved the marketing team's overall efficiency.
